subject: fix(quality): resolve prop mutation, timer leaks, O(n²) lookup, and missing error boundary
body:
Code review audit identified and fixed several quality issues:

- ImportStepReview: emit events instead of mutating props directly (bug)
- ExpenseForm, HelpDrawer, DebugPill, useTagAutocomplete: add onUnmounted
  cleanup for setTimeout calls that could leak on component unmount
- variance.ts: replace expenses.find() inside loop with Map lookup (O(n²)→O(n))
- ProjectedTab: wrap calculateProjection computed in try-catch

Tags: code-quality, timer-leak, prop-mutation, performance, error-handling
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review-audit
Semver: patch

title: resolve prop mutation, timer leaks, O(n²) lookup, and missing error boundary
